notes: SHIP v1.14.301 - N-06 Rail Compass, STAGE 2 of 3 (3D emitters; owner 'ship it once the recon lands', RACK SCENE LOCK cleared by owner scoped to additive selection emitters ONLY). Tapping a unit in the reh3d Inspection Bay (rackElevation_render3D) now lights an additive cyan SPAN BAND on both FRONT rails + bright cage-nut hole DOTS at the tapped unit, positioned by the shared eia_holesForSpan() (same source of truth as the Compass litSet and the Stage-1 flat U-map). Recon-driven (4-agent map + synthesis over the ~1000-line render fn): coordinates VERIFIED (railX = +/-(RW/2-0.13), zFront = RD/2-0.24+0.05 proud of the perforated face per the .260 U-ticks, yFor(u)=yBase+(u-0.5)*uH, hole worldY = yFor(u)+(0.5-frac)*uH with frac from the TOP). Pieces: (1) _rail3dSelGrp + _rail3dSel declared null at the trayGroups declare-above-first-use anchor (the exact R4 trap site), assigned ONCE at the hlBand build (no re-var). (2) Emitters built right after hlBand: two thin BoxGeometry bands (one per front rail, shared MeshBasic cyan #28e0ff additive, depthWrite:false, scale.y stretches over the span) + ONE InstancedMesh of CircleGeometry dots (MeshBasic cyan additive) sized totalU*3*2; all under _rail3dSelGrp under rackGrp so the teardown traverse + forceContextLoss free them. (3) _rail3dSetSel(uStart,uEnd) helper: normalises the span, sets band scale/pos, rebuilds ONLY the cage-nut dot matrices from eia_holesForSpan (No-Silent-Failures: warn+toast on missing U-span or missing hole model). (4) Breathe folded into the existing bayTick §C 'bt' clock (band + dot opacity, no-ops when hidden, alloc-free). (5) State: SET on a device tap in raycast (placed AFTER the existing setExplode(false) so it survives the sheet stow); CLEARED on rack collapse (setExplode(false)) and on a miss-tap (empty-space else on the if(hits.length) block). InstancedMesh/setMatrixAt confirmed supported in the vendored three (drive bays/ports use it). DELIBERATE DEFAULTS (owner may re-rule): (a) 3D shows the CAGE-NUT holes only, NOT the dim context holes the flat U-map draws - setColorAt/instanceColor is only 1 occurrence in vendored three (too thin to bet the most-delicate build on per-instance color) AND the faint context dots barely read in perspective / add clutter; the cage holes are the actionable mount points. (b) selection PERSISTS through the device-sheet open + return (set after setExplode(false), not cleared on sheet-open). (c) dot radius 0.024 / band 0.18x0.03 sized off the 0.17 rail face - may want fatter for gloved glance. Cyan #28e0ff distinct from hlBand's scrub teal #00d4aa (both additive under rackGrp, can co-render on one U by design). Gates: braces 11765->11781 balanced, CRLF preserved, three-stamp .300->.301. NO scene-lock surface touched (no rig/materials/fog/tone-map/tray geometry/floor edit) - additive emitters only. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): open a rack detail -> AISLE/3D (reh3d Inspection Bay) -> tap a unit -> cyan span band on both front rails over that unit's U-height + bright cyan dots at its cage-nut holes, breathing; tap another unit -> selection moves; tap empty space -> clears; explode/collapse -> clears; open the device sheet + return -> selection still there. Watch: does the cyan read distinct from the teal scrub band; is the band proud of the rail face (no z-fight); are the dots big enough gloved. Batch device-verify .286->.301 (15 ships) open.
